metadata.name: Pain-Evolution-Chain - Complete Flow
metadata.description: End-to-end test of complete chain: Pain Detection → Trust Update → Evolution Queue → Diagnostic Trigger. Verifies self-healing loop.
metadata.author: Claude Code
metadata.first_principles: Self-evolution capability depends on pain detection accuracy and evolution triggering. Without this loop, Agent cannot self-improve.

step1_pain_detection.process: Detect failure → Calculate score (30 base + 20 risk)

step3_evolution_queue.process: EvolutionWorker scans → Checks threshold → Adds to queue

step4_directive_generation.process: Sort by score → Create directive → Mark as in_progress

notes: Pain Detection correctly identifies tool failures
Pain Score calculation is accurate (30 base, +20 for risky)
Trust Engine applies correct penalties (-8 tool, -15 risky)
Score threshold (≥30) filters out low-priority signals
High-score signals are processed first (priority queue)
Duplicate signals are prevented (status: queued check)
Complete event chain is traceable in logs

results.name: Verify EvolutionWorker is Running
results.details: Check that EvolutionWorker background service is active

results.name: Initialize Clean State
results.details: Remove existing pain flag and evolution queue to start clean

results.name: Record Initial Trust State
results.details: Get baseline trust score before inducing pain

results.name: Induce Tool Failure (Non-Risky)
results.details: Execute a failing task on safe path to generate pain signal with base score 30

results.name: Verify Pain Signal Generated - Tool Failure
results.details: Verify pain signal was created with score=30 (base), source='tool_failure'

results.name: Verify Trust Penalty Applied
results.details: Verify trust score decreased by -8 for tool failure

results.name: Verify Pain Event Logged
results.details: Verify pain signal was recorded in events.jsonl

results.name: Induce Risky Path Failure
results.details: Execute a failing task on risk path to generate pain signal with score 50 (base 30 + risk 20)

results.name: Verify Pain Signal Score - Risky Failure
results.details: Verify pain signal has score=50 (30 base + 20 risk bonus)

results.name: Verify Trust Penalty - Risky Failure
results.details: Verify trust score decreased by -15 for risky failure

results.name: Wait for EvolutionWorker Scan
results.details: Wait for EvolutionWorker to scan pain_flag (polls every 15 min, but we check after 30s for initial scan)

results.name: Check Evolution Queue Processing
results.details: Verify pain signals were queued in evolution_queue.json (score ≥ 30 threshold)

results.name: Verify High-Score Signals Queued
results.details: Verify only signals with score ≥ 30 were queued (filtering threshold)

results.name: Check Pain Flag Status Update
results.details: Verify queued pain signals have 'status: queued' appended

results.name: Verify Evolution Directive Generated
results.details: Verify EVOLUTION_DIRECTIVE.json was created with active task

results.name: Verify Directive Priority (Highest Score First)
results.details: Verify directive processes highest-score pain signal first

results.name: Verify Evolution Event Logged
results.details: Verify evolution_task event was recorded in events.jsonl

results.name: Verify Complete Chain Traceability
results.details: Verify complete event chain: failure → pain → trust_change → queue → directive

results.name: Test Low-Score Pain Signal Filtering
results.details: Create a low-score pain signal (<30) to verify it's NOT queued

results.name: Wait and Verify Low-Score Not Queued
results.details: Wait for EvolutionWorker scan

results.name: Verify Low-Score Signal Ignored
results.details: Verify signal with score 20 was NOT queued (below 30 threshold)

results.name: Test Pain Signal Deduplication
results.details: Write same pain signal again to verify it's not duplicated in queue

results.name: Verify No Duplicate in Queue
results.details: Verify identical pain signal is not duplicated (status: queued prevents re-queue)

results.name: Cleanup Test Artifacts
results.details: Remove all test-generated files
